subject: A heavily-equipped humanoid figure running or sliding down a snowy mountain slope, gear clanking and red cape streaming behind
description: A compact, stout humanoid figure — heavily laden with climbing and survival gear including carabiners, rope, picks, and a long hooked staff — runs or slides down a snow-covered mountain slope in aggressive motion. A vivid red cape streams behind. Goggles are pushed up on the forehead. The figure's expression is visible: weathered, determined. Snow flies around the figure's boots and lower body. The background is a wide alpine vista of white slopes and pale sky. The gear density is high — this figure carries a working kit, not decorative arms.
foreground: Stout humanoid figure loaded with climbing gear, staff in hand, red cape, snow spray at feet
